heading: Extra copies of documents and reports
label: 702 Extra copies of documents and reports
text: Copies in addition to the “usual number” of documents and reports shall be printed promptly when ready for publication, and may be bound in paper or cloth as the Joint Committee on Printing directs.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964, ed., §§ 132, 134 (, §§ 2, 73, , 612, , ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 2328 Stat. 601Mar. 1, 1907, ch. 2284, § 134 Stat. 1013
